metrics.heading: Overall Mood
metrics.phrase: Asian Paints' outlook is mixed but they're still upbeat about their strategy.
metrics.label: Thriving

metrics.heading: Company Outlook
metrics.phrase: They see a promising future with ambitious growth plans.
metrics.label: Promising

metrics.heading: Sustainability
metrics.phrase: Sustainability efforts are seen as weak, needing improvement.
metrics.label: Dirty

metrics.heading: Environmental
metrics.phrase: Mixed view on environmental impact and sustainability measures.
metrics.label: Mixed

metrics.heading: People & Society
metrics.phrase: Poor performance in people and society issues.
metrics.label: Poor

metrics.heading: Corporate Governance
metrics.phrase: Weak governance structure remains an issue.
metrics.label: Weak

metrics.heading: Management Honesty
metrics.phrase: Managers are open and honest about challenges.
metrics.label: Open

metrics.heading: Financial Health
metrics.phrase: The company's financial health is excellent, with strong margins.
metrics.label: Excellent

metrics.heading: Growth Plans
metrics.phrase: They have very ambitious growth plans for the future.
metrics.label: Very Ambitious

metrics.heading: Risk Level
metrics.phrase: Despite risks, they consider their risk level to be very safe.
metrics.label: Very Safe

metrics.heading: Investor Confidence
metrics.phrase: Investors trust Asian Paints and see them as a very trusted company.
metrics.label: Very Trusted
